/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libarmor_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/armor_info__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/armor_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/armor_interfaces/msg/detail/serial_driver__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
